hypothesis: Combining MACD and EMA with Bollinger Bands and Keltner Channels can effectively identify overbought/oversold conditions, while Stochastic RSI identifies trend momentum to enter long positions when they have the highest probability of success.

The strategy aims to capture the momentum of a currency pair by focusing on its price movement and trend. It uses Bollinger Bands for identifying overbought/oversold levels, RSI for confirming trends, ATR for managing risk, and various other indicators like Stochastic Keltner Channels, Supertrend Bearish, Donchian Channel Middle, Aroon Downside and Aroon Upside to generate buy or sell signals. The SL is set at 1% and TP at 4%, with an additional filter to exclude situations where the trend becomes too aggressive.
